evals.name: component-usage
evals.prompt: In the project at /home/fenrir/code/camhr/camhr-pc (a Vue 2 project open in WebStorm), find every place the `apply-list` component is imported or used. Report a list of file:line locations with one-line context for each hit. Do not modify any files.

evals.name: api-caller-search
evals.prompt: In the project at /home/fenrir/code/camhr/camhr-pc (a Vue 2 project open in WebStorm), find all call sites of functions exported from `api/companyService.js`. Report which Vue components / pages call which companyService function, grouped by file. Do not modify any files.

evals.name: i18n-key-lookup
evals.prompt: In the project at /home/fenrir/code/camhr/camhr-pc (a Vue 2 project open in WebStorm), pick any one i18n key that appears in `locales/en.json` (or equivalent) that contains the word `login`, and find every place that key is referenced (e.g. via `$t('…')` or `i18n.t('…')`). Report the key you picked and the file:line references. Do not modify any files.

evals.name: java-routing-negative
evals.prompt: In the Java Spring Boot project at /home/fenrir/code/camhr/camhr (a Java/Maven project that is NOT a JS/TS project), find all callers of `UserService.create` or a similarly-named user-creation service method. Report file:line locations. Do not modify any files.
